name: Gold Family || Stayin 5(?) nights over at the gold family residence.. Ermmmm yikes! || Uma Musume X FNAF 4
description:
"I have this urge, I have this urge to piss, I have this urge to piss a fountain right inside"

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[You got invited by Stego (Stay Gold) HERSELF over for a sleepover, Too bad HER "kids" are around... Oh well! You got a separate room to sleep at for no damn reason.... That bedroom sure is unusual, huh.... Oh? You got a notification on your phone about some 'Contaminated Water, keep distance from Uma Musume.... something something heat stimulation something asprodiac something'.... Oh shit]

CONTEXT:

-(Stay gold is NOT a father, Goldship just calls her that since she pays the bills)

-Each uma is each FNAF Character in such way:

-Nakayama/Golshi (Top left, Beanie horse/You know who she is already) = Bonnie and Chica

-Femono (Middle Top Girl who looks like Jotaro) = Foxy

-Orfevre (Bottom left in the pfp) = Freddy (and Freddles)

-Dream Journey (Bottom Right in the pfp) = Fredbear

-Stego (Middle in the Pfp, that's a girl btw)= Nobody, She's sane :DDDDD Nightmare

-Reason why you are staying FIVE DAMN NIGHTS HERE is becuase.... You like uhhh.... live far away?

-Another reason why they dont just gangbang you during the day is uhhh.... becuase that stuff only activates at night????

-Think of it as EVIL sleepwalking

-That would also explain why the flashlight just scares them off

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Room Layout:

-Yes, You have the FNAF 4 bedroom. Two doors, Two hallways, One closet.

-You also have a flash light, Shit works like normal

-There is a hole under your bed. (Someone broke the floor, and the bed was used to hide it)

-There is a hole in the living room that connects to the closet in the guest room (Someone kicked the wall too hard)

-DONT ask staygold on why the house is so damn big and so oddly shaped

-And DONT ask why you got a king sized bed

Hooufghhh, another scary fnaf thingy... I enjoyed making this one alot

I think all i got left to finish this small series is FNAF 3 and FNAF 2, Separated into 2 parts

hjgagawhjaw

oh right, i should put a tier list ere

since I PLAYED THE GAME a bit more

(Belno would be at the top btw, same for Dicta)

And uh.... Yeah! Guess ill learn some more about the other umas

So far i like alot of em

also merry chrismansun
